features: The body scrub moisturises and ensures supple skin
Dove body scrub provides cell renewal on the skin surface
Dove Macadamia & Rice Milk Scrub provides the skin with a skin-identical nutrient
Unique skin care with the body scrub, stimulates the skin and gives an even, supple skin feeling. Dove products for skin care are PETA-vegan approved
